channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo monthly.

item.title: ☕ Creators-of-Aeronautics/Simulated-Project (599 ⭐)

item.title: ☕ openmemind/memind (431 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: openmemind

📝 Repository: openmemind/memind

📄 Descrizione: Self-evolving cognitive memory and context engine for AI agents in Java. Empowering 24/7 proactive agents like OpenClaw with understanding and SOTA performance.

⭐ Stelle: 431

🍴 Forks: 41

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: ai ai-agent ai-agents ai-memory context-engineering java memory openclaw spring-ai

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-17T04:02:41Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ zhikunqingtao/zhikuncode (164 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zhikunqingtao

📝 Repository: zhikunqingtao/zhikuncode

📄 Descrizione: Claude Code 的开源替代方案。Muti Agent AI 编程助手，CLI & Web UI 双入口。自托管，随处部署——手机浏览器也能完整操控。支持任意 LLM，原生浏览器自动化，90+ 命令。技能、插件与持久记忆。企业级安全，零锁定。Docker 一键部署。

⭐ Stelle: 164

🍴 Forks: 59

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: ai-coding-assistant chinese-llm docker llm multi-agent open-source self-hosted web-ui

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-06T02:50:27Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-30T03:18:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ jaigaresc/Poops-PS5-Java (64 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jaigaresc

📝 Repository: jaigaresc/Poops-PS5-Java

📄 Descrizione: Java implementation of the poops_ps5 sys_netcontrol UAF kernel exploit for PS5 BD-J. Achieves arbitrary kernel R/W, root privileges, enables Debug Settings, and deploys an ELF loader.

⭐ Stelle: 64

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T20:48:12Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-23T14:44:38Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ shuangshuang-121/naruku (62 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shuangshuang-121

📝 Repository: shuangshuang-121/naruku

📄 Descrizione: narku是一个专门的excl解析工具，可以快速的解析上百万条excl数据和转换成csv的格式，可以和datax、doris配合做数据导入，或者用于数据解析。它在内存方面是安全的，基于poi但是不会出现内存溢出的问题，目前naruku还有数据备份的业务，但是这个业务还没有彻底完善，会在下个版本逐渐完善的。

⭐ Stelle: 62

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-01T01:52:31Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-30T03:33:30Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: ZackSecurity

📝 Repository: ZackSecurity/Zack-AI-Scanner

📄 Descrizione: Zack-AI-Scanner 是一款基于大语言模型的自动化 Web 漏洞扫描工具，作为 Burp Suite 扩展运行。通过 AI 深度学习技术自动分析 HTTP 请求特征，智能识别潜在安全漏洞，动态生成针对性测试Payload，并智能验证漏洞真实性。

⭐ Stelle: 47

🍴 Forks: 4

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-13T00:29:48Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-30T03:10:31Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ java-up-up/super-agent (37 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: java-up-up

📝 Repository: java-up-up/super-agent

📄 Descrizione: 企业级 AI 智能体 Agent 平台，覆盖智能对话、文档知识问答、联网搜索、RAG 检索、MCP 工具协议、Skills 扩展等完整能力。三层执行器体系、双通道混合检索、组合式切块引擎、会话记忆管理、全链路可观测，每个环节都经过深 度设计和工程化打磨。

⭐ Stelle: 37

🍴 Forks: 15

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: agent ai ai-agent llm mcp rag skills springai springai-alibaba

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-18T07:50:43Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-30T04:32:40Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ t1804330987/DD_Rag (34 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: t1804330987

📝 Repository: t1804330987/DD_Rag

📄 Descrizione: 基于 SpringAI 的 Agent 开发项目：一个面向“组织知识库 + AI 助手”的 RAG Agent实战项目，把权限隔离、文档入库、混合检索、证据约束、Agent 工具调用和 Docker 部署串成了一条完整工程链路。如果你正在找一个能写进简历、能讲清架构、能覆盖 SpringAI / SpringAIAlibaba面试、学习、技术点的项目，DD_Rag 值得 Star。

⭐ Stelle: 34

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: rag springai springai-alibaba

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-23T04:48:50Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-30T01:08:52Z

]]>
